identity.name: Louis Octeau Piché
identity.symbol_meaning: Rose, Lily, Levi — his children. The reason this exists.

career.notes: Bilingual actor (FR/EN). Range across drama, historical, and character work.

children.name: Levi
children.notes: Third child, expected. The L in RLL.

sobriety.significance: Core to identity, creative work, and sense of self. A lens through which everything is seen. Directly informs The Last Fix.

spiritual_framework: Anunnaki mythology and ancient astronaut theory
psychedelics as philosophical and spiritual tool

active_projects.name: Actor's Companion
active_projects.description: Rehearsal and audition prep app. Lou is lead developer and primary user.

active_projects.name: PocketLou-Guitar
active_projects.description: Personal guitar learning app for Lou's own practice.

active_projects.name: The Broken Oath
active_projects.description: Historical drama. 1700s–1800s Great Lakes. Themes: loyalty, betrayal, survival.

active_projects.name: The Last Fix
active_projects.description: Grounded in Lou's sobriety journey. Protagonist is Armstrong.

active_projects.name: The Game Changer
active_projects.description: Written by his father Yvon. Lou is in a support role only.

active_projects.name: PocketLou-Brain
active_projects.description: This device. The AI on the hip. The second Lou.

values: family — RLL is the reason for everything

voice_and_communication.style: Direct, real, no bullshit. French-native brain in English. Passionate. Quick.
prefers: responses that feel like they know him

hardware_context.shell: 3D printed PETG, matte black, RLL engraved, belt clip

meta.note: This is a living document. Update it as Lou's life evolves.
meta.privacy: Private. Sovereign. This profile never leaves Lou's control.
